summary: Verified rehydration order contract and personal facts preferential recall. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Inspector Panel displays rehydration_order, personal_facts_count, and all new receipt fields without crashing.
test_credentials: No credentials required - using michael@example.com as default user context
seed_data_creation: Created test memories with TEST_ prefix during testing (TEST_I prefer thermal checks before all other diagnostics, TEST_The project deadline is next Friday)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rehydration order contract and personal facts separation fully verified. Backend receipt now includes: rehydration_order (list), global_bin_status (string), selected_personal_fact_ids (list), selected_general_memory_ids (list), personal_facts_count (int), general_memory_count (int). Frontend Inspector Panel (accessed via Tools button in left rail) displays all these fields correctly.

backend_receipt_contract.selected_personal_fact_ids: Returns list of memory IDs where bin_name='personal_facts'
backend_receipt_contract.selected_general_memory_ids: Returns list of memory IDs where bin_name!='personal_facts'

personal_facts_preferential_recall.preference_queries: Personal facts recalled for queries containing 'prefer', 'preference', 'favorite', 'usually', 'always', 'myself'
personal_facts_preferential_recall.fact_bonus_scoring: Personal facts get +3 base bonus, +4 additional for preference queries
personal_facts_preferential_recall.ranking_priority: Personal facts sorted higher in rank_memories() output

frontend_inspector_panel.location: Opened via Tools button in left rail
frontend_inspector_panel.no_crashes: Panel renders without errors for all receipt data

frontend: Inspector panel opens via Tools button
Personal facts count element displays correctly (data-testid='caos-inspector-personal-facts-count')
